template.name: vibe-code-starter
template.description: A vibe-coding starter template that bootstraps a curated set of Claude Code / Codex plugins, skills, and brand identity on first load.

marketplaces.name: vibe-code-starter
marketplaces.description: Local marketplace bundling the plugins vendored under .claude/plugins/ in this repo. Self-contained, installs offline.

marketplaces.name: ponytail
marketplaces.description: Ponytail marketplace — 'lazy senior dev' skill that forces minimal solutions (YAGNI, stdlib-first) to cut code + tokens.

plugins._note: Plugins under .claude/plugins/ are INERT until installed from a marketplace. Install at user scope. Health check: `claude plugin list --json`.

optional.name: ponytail
optional.requires: node on PATH (for the activation hook)

optionalTools._note: External CLI tools (NOT Claude Code marketplace plugins) that reduce token usage. setup.md offers each with its description and installs only if the user opts in. Check platform support (Homebrew/uv/node) first.

rtk.name: rtk
rtk.purpose: CLI proxy that filters/compresses command output (ls/cat/grep/git/test runners) before it reaches the model — 60-90% fewer tokens from tool output, <10ms overhead.

install.windowsBinary: Download rtk-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip from the repo Releases; put rtk.exe on PATH.
install.postInstall: rtk hook claude   (register the Claude Code hook; see repo INSTALL.md)

rtk.notes: Name collision: rtk-ai/rtk is the Token Killer; reachingforthejack/rtk is a DIFFERENT project. NEVER `cargo install rtk` from crates.io — use `cargo install --git`.

graphify.name: graphify
graphify.purpose: Maps the whole project into a queryable knowledge graph (code via tree-sitter AST, fully local; docs/PDFs/images via the model). Query/trace/explain instead of grepping — cuts exploration tokens.

outputStyles._note: Delivered as skills-dir plugins (they have .claude-plugin/plugin.json + hooks under .claude/skills/). They auto-load once the workspace is trusted and plugins are reloaded — no marketplace install required.

skills._note: True SKILL.md skills under .claude/skills/ auto-load at project scope once the workspace is trusted. No install needed; verify presence + load.

brand._note: brand-guidelines ships as a placeholder template. setup.md interviews the user and fills in the skill + brand docs for THEIR brand, then flips configured=true.

colors._ratio: primary + background ~45-50% each; accent MAX 10% of composition

state._note: setup.md updates these flags as it completes each phase so re-runs are idempotent.
